title: caralluma knobelii var. langii
intro: Caralluma knobelii var. langii, also known as Caralluma langii, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family, native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in weight loss, improve appetite suppression, and lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Caralluma langii include its potential to reduce body fat, improve insulin sensitivity, and enhance mental clarity. Caralluma langii is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, and can also be found in traditional Ayurvedic medicine preparations.
